external_material: World Models 2026 (LeCun JEPA, Georgia Tech TMK, Ken Huang taxonomy)
topic: World Models as mirror of Dreamer cognitive skeleton
key_discovery: Dreamer walk = cognitive equivalent of counterfactual world model run. Skeleton is internal simulator (world model), not knowledge base (memory store). JEPA abstract space prediction = skeleton pattern simulation. Georgia Tech TMK maps to walk analysis flow.
sources: web_search: Georgia Tech Metacognitive ToM Revision 2026

unverified_connections: Counterfactual reasoning requires explicit causal model (Pearl do-calculus); skeleton has correlation but no causal directionality
JEPA encoder-predictor separation may map to walk flow but needs verification
